message.content:
{
  "summary": "The extraction failed. While header fields (company, date, address, subtotal, tax) were mostly correct, the total amount was incorrect, and the line item extraction was incomplete and inaccurate.",
  "failure_reasons": [
    "Incorrect total calculation",
    "Missing line items",
    "Hallucinated/merged line item descriptions"
  ],
  "field_notes": {
    "company": "Correct.",
    "date": "Correct (format differs from gold but value is identical).",
    "address": "Correct.",
    "subtotal": "Correct.",
    "tax": "Correct.",
    "total": "Incorrect. Predicted 55.51, gold is 64.52. The prediction seems to have missed the gratuity.",
    "line_items": "Failed. Only 4 items were extracted instead of 6. Additionally, descriptions were merged incorrectly (e.g., 'Enmoladas with Meat pollo' and 'Flautas Chicken Coloradito'), and the 'POLLO' item was not treated as a separate entity."
  }
}
